name: hermes-codex-learning
description: Local Codex hooks and skills that export learning signals into Hermes Agent.

interface.shortDescription: Export Codex learning signals into Hermes.
interface.longDescription: Adds Codex lifecycle hooks and a skill that help a local Hermes Agent learn from Codex sessions by writing redacted event logs, failure patterns, correction candidates, and session summaries into the Hermes home directory.
defaultPrompt: Use Hermes learning bridge for this coding session.
Export useful Codex failures for Hermes to learn.
Review this repo with Hermes-compatible learning notes.
